text: Beetroot juice supplementation increases nitric oxide levels, which improves blood flow, gas exchange, mitochondrial biogenesis and efficiency, and muscle contraction strength.

Beetroot juice supplementation can improve cardiorespiratory endurance by increasing efficiency, improving performance at various distances, and increasing time to exhaustion at submaximal intensities.
Beetroot juice supplementation may improve cardiorespiratory performance at anaerobic threshold intensities and increase maximum oxygen uptake (VO2max).
Beetroot juice supplementation may mitigate the negative effects of hypoxia (altitude) on cardiorespiratory endurance, though evidence is contradictory.
Caffeine may undermine the ergogenic effects of beetroot juice supplementation when the two are combined.
The combination of beetroot juice with other supplements has no clearly established positive or negative effect on cardiorespiratory endurance.
